design.general_hypothesis: Authorized retained state can change a consequential action boundary while absent, expired, conflicting, or revoked state should preserve state and elicit precise recovery.
design.useful_completion: Public-interface canaries pass before calls and every fresh cell is retained after one attempt.

prior_versions.policy: preserve byte-for-byte and never reinterpret or retry v3 outcomes
